fields.label: Item
fields.description: Pick the item to reconcile. The batches table + totals populate ONLY after Default Warehouse is also set, scoped to that warehouse.

fields.label: Default Warehouse
fields.description: Warehouse to reconcile. All batches table rows + parent totals are scoped to this warehouse. Each child row's warehouse is auto-populated from this field and is read-only.

fields.label: Item Name
fields.description: Mirror of Item.item_name. Fetched via fetch_from to avoid an extra round-trip.

fields.label: Company
fields.description: Used to resolve the Stock Adjustment account when the real ERPNext Stock Reconciliation is created on submit.

fields.label: Default UOM
fields.description: Item.stock_uom — the authoritative UOM that the ERPNext Bin stores qty in. Auto-populated.

fields.label: Total Current Stock of Item (in Default UOM)
fields.description: Sum of Bin.actual_qty for this item in the chosen Default Warehouse. Snapshot at the moment item + warehouse were picked.

fields.label: Total Qty Actually Found (in Default UOM)
fields.description: Σ over all child rows of:  qty_found_in_stock_uom (if qty_found is set on that row) OR  current_stock_in_stock_uom (if qty_found left blank). Recomputed live on any child row edit.

fields.label: Higher UOM
fields.description: Item's largest-CF UOM from its UOM Conversion Detail table (e.g., if item has Gram (default) + Kg in the item master, this resolves to Kg). Falls back to stock UOM if the item has no alt UOM configured.

fields.label: Total Current Stock of Item (in Higher UOM)
fields.description: total_current_stock_in_default_uom ÷ higher_uom_cf.

fields.label: Total Qty Actually Found (in Higher UOM)
fields.description: total_qty_found_in_default_uom ÷ higher_uom_cf. Recomputed live.

fields.label: Higher UOM CF
fields.description: Internal: conversion factor for higher_uom relative to stock_uom. Hidden helper field.

fields.label: Edit Posting
fields.description: When OFF (default), Posting Date + Time are read-only and pinned to 'now'. Toggle ON to allow backdating before submit.

fields.label: Posting Date
fields.description: Date the SR will be posted on. Defaults to today; lift the lock via 'Edit Posting' to backdate.

fields.label: Posting Time
fields.description: Time-of-day for the SR. Defaults to 'now'.

fields.label: Batches
fields.description: Auto-populated on item change with one row per (batch, warehouse) where current Bin qty > 0. Type a Qty Found on any row to update the parent totals live. Rows where Qty Found is BLANK are excluded from the real ERPNext SR on submit (their current stock is implicitly retained).

fields.label: User Remark
fields.description: Free-form note from the SRT operator (Srt User). Optional. Use to record context — e.g., 'WH 1.9 monthly cycle count, 2026-05-21, scale calibration verified', notable discrepancies seen during the count, batches that physically couldn't be located, etc.

fields.label: Admin Remark
fields.description: Free-form note from Srt Admin during the Draft → Admin Approval transition. Optional. Use to record the admin's review verdict — e.g., 'Counts reasonable; approved for ledger posting'.

fields.label: Admin Approved By
fields.description: Auto-stamped with frappe.session.user when the SRT is submitted (Draft → Admin Approval). Read-only — set by the controller's on_submit hook. Placed directly under Admin Remark for visual pairing.

fields.label: Super Admin Remark
fields.description: Free-form note from Srt Super Admin during the Admin Approval → Super Admin Approval transition. Optional. Editable AFTER the SRT is submitted (allow_on_submit=1) because the super admin writes it on a Submitted doc just before clicking 'Submit Linked ERPNext SR'.

fields.label: Super Admin Approved By
fields.description: Auto-stamped with frappe.session.user when the linked ERPNext SR is submitted via submit_linked_sr() (Admin Approval → Super Admin Approval). Read-only — set by the controller. Placed directly under Super Admin Remark for visual pairing.

fields.label: Linked ERPNext SR
fields.description: Populated on submit (Draft → Admin Approval). Points at the real ERPNext Stock Reconciliation created in DRAFT by this SRT doc. The ERPNext SR is submitted only when Srt Super Admin moves the workflow to Super Admin Approval. Shown as a clickable column in the list view (stock_reconciliation_srt_list.js adds a formatter; an empty value on an admin-approved row renders a red 'Missing — relink' hint). in_standard_filter lets admins filter for blanks to spot orphans.

fields.label: Status
fields.description: Frappe workflow state. Lifecycle: Draft → Admin Approval (Srt Admin submits, draft ERPNext SR created) → Super Admin Approval (Srt Super Admin submits the ERPNext SR) → Close (cancelled). Managed by the Stock Reconciliation SRT Workflow. NOTE: in_list_view is INTENTIONALLY OMITTED — Frappe's list view auto-renders a colored Status indicator at the start of every row for workflow-enabled doctypes. Adding in_list_view=1 here causes the Status column to appear twice (auto-indicator + explicit column). Keep filter only.
